## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / Error Logs
Include any terminal stack traces, console error logs, or screenshot attachments.

## Environment Details
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia]
- Browser / Client: [e.g., Chrome 126, Telegram Client]
- Database state (if relevant): [e.g., seeded clean, production replica]
